notes: z19 shows the house and surrounding lot/backyard context together; z20 is close but shadowed/partly cropped, z18 gives broader neighborhood context. Google quality appears typical to slightly worse than ideal Mapbox/Bing due to heavy tree shadows.

z19 provides the best balance of house, driveway/frontage, and rear/tree-lot context; z20 is more detailed but too tight, z18 is useful for setting. Google quality is usable but somewhat dark/shadowed, likely not clearly better than typical Mapbox/Bing.

Clear top-down view with house, yard, driveway, adjacent trees, and lot context visible; z20 also detailed but slightly tight, z18 good for neighborhood context. Google quality looks strong and likely better than many typical Mapbox/Bing sheets.

z19 shows the subject structure/lot area and surrounding homes/driveways; z20 is useful but tight and somewhat shadowed, z18 adds broader complex/road context. Google quality is adequate but not clearly better than typical Mapbox/Bing due to contrast/shadows.

z19 cleanly captures the house, lot, cul-de-sac frontage, neighboring homes, and forest edge; z20 is detailed but tighter, z18 gives excellent wider setting. Google quality appears good and likely comparable to or better than typical Mapbox/Bing.
z19 best balances house, driveway, and backyard/lot context; z20 is closer but softer/partly shadowed. Google quality usable, not clearly better than typical Mapbox/Bing.
z19 shows house/driveway and surrounding lot reasonably well; trees and mixed rural clutter reduce clarity. Google quality comparable to typical Mapbox/Bing.
z19 gives useful view of house, small lot, street/rail context; z20 is closer but less complete. Google quality usable/comparable, with some shadows.

z19 shows the house and landscaped lot near the crosshair, though the coordinate is on the road and house is offset. Google imagery is clear, likely as good as or slightly better than typical Mapbox/Bing here.
z19 clearly captures house, driveway, yard/treed lot, and road access; z20 is detailed but tighter. Google quality good, comparable to or better than typical Mapbox/Bing despite shadows.
